name: ADR file naming follows the date-slug convention required by section 2.16
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 First decision\nstatus: accepted\n' > docs/adr/0001-first-decision.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr 2>out.txt && grep -q 'all_naming_valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
